description: A comprehensive action prompt for a short film scene involving dynamic camera movements and high-speed combat in a neon-lit alley.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 用于短片场景的综合动作提示词，包含霓虹灯照明小巷中的动态镜头运动和高速格斗。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 用於短片場景的綜合動作提示詞，包含霓虹燈照明巷弄中的動態鏡頭運動和高速格鬥。
description_i18n.ja: ネオンライトの路地でのダイナミックなカメラワークと高速戦闘を含む短編映画シーン用の包括的アクションプロンプト。
description_i18n.ko: 네온 조명 골목에서의 역동적인 카메라 움직임과 고속 전투를 포함한 단편 영화 장면용 종합 액션 프롬프트.
description_i18n.de: Ein umfassender Action-Prompt für eine Kurzfilmszene mit dynamischen Kamerabewegungen und Hochgeschwindigkeitskämpfen in einer neonbeleuchteten Gasse.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt d'action complet pour une scène de court métrage avec des mouvements de caméra dynamiques et un combat rapide dans une ruelle éclairée au néon.
description_i18n.ru: Комплексный экшн-промпт для сцены короткометражного фильма с динамичными движениями камеры и скоростным боем в неоновом переулке.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt de acción completo para una escena de cortometraje con movimientos de cámara dinámicos y combate de alta velocidad en un callejón iluminado con neón.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt de ação abrangente para cena de curta-metragem com movimentos dinâmicos de câmera e combate em alta velocidade em um beco iluminado por neon.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt d'azione completo per una scena di cortometraggio con movimenti di camera dinamici e combattimenti ad alta velocità in un vicolo illuminato al neon.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt hành động toàn diện cho cảnh phim ngắn với chuyển động camera động và chiến đấu tốc độ cao trong hẻm ánh đèn neon.
description_i18n.pl: Kompleksowy prompt akcji do sceny krótkometrażowej z dynamicznymi ruchami kamery i szybką walką w neonowo oświetlonej uliczce.
description_i18n.id: Prompt aksi komprehensif untuk adegan film pendek dengan gerakan kamera dinamis dan pertarungan berkecepatan tinggi di gang dengan pencahayaan neon.
description_i18n.nl: Een uitgebreide actie-prompt voor een kortfilmscène met dynamische camerabewegingen en snelle gevechten in een neonverlichte steeg.
description_i18n.ar: موجه حركة شامل لمشهد فيلم قصير يتضمن حركات كاميرا ديناميكية وقتال عالي السرعة في زقاق مضاء بالنيون.
description_i18n.tr: Neon ışıklı bir sokakta dinamik kamera hareketleri ve yüksek hızlı dövüş içeren kısa film sahnesi için kapsamlı aksiyon istemi.
description_i18n.uk: Комплексний екшн-промпт для сцени короткометражного фільму з динамічними рухами камери та швидкісним боєм у неоновому провулку.
description_i18n.en: A comprehensive action prompt for a short film scene involving dynamic camera movements and high-speed combat in a neon-lit alley.

query.en:
Draev stands in the center of the neon-lit alley, surrounded by multiple vampires positioned on rooftops and street level.

The vampires attack simultaneously.
Draev reacts instantly with superhuman speed.

He dodges the first attacker with a fast sidestep and counters with a brutal punch, sending the vampire crashing into a wall.

Second vampire lunges from above Draev jumps unnaturally high, grabs him mid-air, and slams him into the ground.

Impact creates a small shockwave on the wet street.
The defeated vampire rapidly disintegrates into ash and particles.

Camera moves dynamically:
starts frontal wide shot transitions into fast tracking side movement then switches to over-the-shoulder following Draev More vampires rush in.

Draev performs a fast acrobatic kick hitting two enemies at once.

One vampire is thrown into neon signs, sparks and electricity burst.

Another gets grabbed by the throat — Draev lifts him with one hand and crushes him, turning him into ash.
Rain reacts to movement, splashes intensify with impacts.

Final moment:
Draev stands still in the center, surrounded by falling ash, breathing slightly, eyes glowing red.
Remaining vampires hesitate, stepping back in fear. No music
